title: Reference Product Luxury Brand Editorial Kv Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Product Luxury Brand Editorial KV Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image high-end editorial KV poster using attached luxury product photo before editorial KV poster design, preserving attach a luxury product photo BRAND: enter your brand name Design a single high-end editorial poster. and presenting it for attach a luxury product photo BRAND: enter your brand name Design a single high-end editorial poster. Subject: attach a luxury product photo BRAND: enter your brand name Design a single high-end editorial poster. is preserved exactly in shape, material, color, proportions, and surface finish while adult model naturally holding the product near the face without covering key details adds complementary human scale without hiding key product details. Scene: Clean minimal premium studio environment with deep rich colors, ample negative space, HDR quality, subtle print texture, and a single luxury advertising focus. Composition: Preserve the product as the hero object, position the authentic attach a luxury product photo BRAND: enter your brand name Design a single high-end editorial poster. identity using specific logo placement variant with readable visual details, balance the model naturally around the product, and keep all layout elements refined and spacious. Signature Elements: Preserved reference product luxury brand editorial kv poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: High-end editorial product poster, luxury commercial KV design, premium studio lighting, ultra-sharp 8K product detail, clean minimal background, and polished brand-campaign finish. Color Palette: Deep rich brand-compatible colors, refined neutrals, premium material highlights, soft skin tones where a model appears, and restrained luxury contrast. Lighting: Premium studio lighting with controlled specular highlights, HDR product definition, soft model fill, subtle logo print texture visibility, and clean shadow falloff. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
